flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at Russell Sage College fell 17% between 2021 and 2024 (52.3% → 43.6%).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Russell Sage College rose 13% between 2021 and 2024 ($33.9k → $38.2k).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Russell Sage College rose 12% between 2006 and 2009 ($24.7k → $27.8k).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Russell Sage College fell 10% between 2021 and 2024 (62.6% → 56.1%).
